action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy is 80.19% with single-layer CLIP features + cosine classifier. The frozen backbone limits feature quality. Analysis: Multi-layer features from intermediate ViT blocks provide complementary information at different abstraction levels. An MLP feature transform can learn better representations before the cosine classifier. Mixup augmentation and TTA should further improve generalization. Decision: Implement multi-layer CLIP (blocks 6,9,11 + final = 3072 dim) + MLP transform + cosine classifier with mixup training and TTA prediction.
